preconditions: I can only initialize a pipeline run A if it is not the case that A is a registered run and it is not the case that A is a promoted run
effects: Once I initialize a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is a registered run

bind_source_commit_to_run.description: bind a source commit B to a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only bind a source commit B to a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered run and B is an available source commit and A is a run allowed by the commit B
I can only bind a source commit B to a pipeline run A if it is not the case that the source is attached to A
effects: Once I bind a source commit B to a pipeline run A, it is the case that A has the source commit B and the source is attached to A
Once I bind a source commit B to a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available source commit

unbind_source_commit_from_run.description: unbind a source commit B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only unbind a source commit B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A has the source commit B
I can only unbind a source commit B from a pipeline run A if it is not the case that the evaluation for A passed and it is not the case that A is authorized by governance
effects: Once I unbind a source commit B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is an available source commit

Once I unbind a source commit B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A has the source commit B and it is not the case anymore that the source is attached to A and it is not the case anymore that local review is granted for A and it is not the case anymore that safety is verified for A and it is not the case anymore that A has a manual attention flag and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for promotion and it is not the case anymore that A requires a secondary review

reserve_cache_node_for_run.description: reserve a cache node B for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only reserve a cache node B for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered run and B is an available cache node
effects: Once I reserve a cache node B for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A runs the reserved cache node B
Once I reserve a cache node B for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available cache node

release_cache_node_from_run.description: release a cache node B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release a cache node B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A runs the reserved cache node B
effects: Once I release a cache node B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is an available cache node
Once I release a cache node B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A runs the reserved cache node B

grant_local_review.description: grant local review for a pipeline run A using a cache node B
preconditions: I can only grant local review for a pipeline run A using a cache node B if it is the case that A is a registered run and the source is attached to A and A runs the reserved cache node B
I can only grant local review for a pipeline run A using a cache node B if it is not the case that local review is granted for A
effects: Once I grant local review for a pipeline run A using a cache node B, it is the case that local review is granted for A

grant_local_review_by_reviewer.description: grant local review for a pipeline run A by a human reviewer B
preconditions: I can only grant local review for a pipeline run A by a human reviewer B if it is the case that A is a registered run and the source is attached to A and B is an available human reviewer
I can only grant local review for a pipeline run A by a human reviewer B if it is not the case that local review is granted for A
effects: Once I grant local review for a pipeline run A by a human reviewer B, it is the case that local review is granted for A and A has a manual attention flag
Once I grant local review for a pipeline run A by a human reviewer B, it is not the case anymore that B is an available human reviewer

operator_verify_cache_with_credential.description: operator verify cache node a cache node B for a pipeline run A using an operator credential C
preconditions: I can only operator verify cache node a cache node B for a pipeline run A using an operator credential C if it is the case that local review is granted for A and the source is attached to A and A runs the reserved cache node B and C is an available operator credential
I can only operator verify cache node a cache node B for a pipeline run A using an operator credential C if it is not the case that safety is verified for A
effects: Once I operator verify cache node a cache node B for a pipeline run A using an operator credential C, it is the case that safety is verified for A
Once I operator verify cache node a cache node B for a pipeline run A using an operator credential C, it is not the case anymore that A has a manual attention flag

verify_cache_via_policy.description: verify cache for a pipeline run A via a promotion policy B
preconditions: I can only verify cache for a pipeline run A via a promotion policy B if it is the case that the source is attached to A and the promotion policy B is applied to the pipeline run A
I can only verify cache for a pipeline run A via a promotion policy B if it is not the case that safety is verified for A
effects: Once I verify cache for a pipeline run A via a promotion policy B, it is the case that safety is verified for A
Once I verify cache for a pipeline run A via a promotion policy B, it is not the case anymore that A has a manual attention flag

assign_quality_gate_to_run.description: assign a quality gate B to a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only assign a quality gate B to a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered run and B is an available quality gate and A is a run allowed by the quality gate B
effects: Once I assign a quality gate B to a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned to run the quality gate B
Once I assign a quality gate B to a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available quality gate

release_quality_gate_from_run.description: release a quality gate B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release a quality gate B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned to run the quality gate B
effects: Once I release a quality gate B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is an available quality gate
Once I release a quality gate B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to run the quality gate B

assign_build_configuration_to_run.description: assign a build configuration B to a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only assign a build configuration B to a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered run and B is an available build configuration and A is a run allowed by the build configuration B
effects: Once I assign a build configuration B to a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned to run the build configuration B
Once I assign a build configuration B to a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available build configuration

release_build_configuration_from_run.description: release a build configuration B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release a build configuration B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned to run the build configuration B
effects: Once I release a build configuration B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is an available build configuration
Once I release a build configuration B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to run the build configuration B

assign_security_scan_to_run.description: assign a security scan B to a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only assign a security scan B to a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered run and B is an available security scan and A is a run allowed by the security scan B
effects: Once I assign a security scan B to a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned to run the security scan B
Once I assign a security scan B to a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available security scan

release_security_scan_from_run.description: release a security scan B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release a security scan B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned to run the security scan B
effects: Once I release a security scan B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is an available security scan
Once I release a security scan B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to run the security scan B

assign_cache_artifact_to_run.description: assign a cache artifact B to a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only assign a cache artifact B to a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered run and B is an available cache artifact and A is a run allowed by the cache artifact B
effects: Once I assign a cache artifact B to a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned to run the cache artifact B
Once I assign a cache artifact B to a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available cache artifact

release_cache_artifact_from_run.description: release a cache artifact B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release a cache artifact B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned to run the cache artifact B
effects: Once I release a cache artifact B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is an available cache artifact
Once I release a cache artifact B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to run the cache artifact B

evaluate_target_with_quality_and_build.description: evaluate a deployment target B with a quality gate C and a build configuration D for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only evaluate a deployment target B with a quality gate C and a build configuration D for a pipeline run A if it is the case that the source is attached to A and A is assigned to run the quality gate C and A is assigned to run the build configuration D and B is an available deployment target and A is a run allowed by the deployment target B
I can only evaluate a deployment target B with a quality gate C and a build configuration D for a pipeline run A if it is not the case that the evaluation for A passed
effects: Once I evaluate a deployment target B with a quality gate C and a build configuration D for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is targeting the deployment B and the evaluation for A passed
Once I evaluate a deployment target B with a quality gate C and a build configuration D for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available deployment target

evaluate_target_with_security_and_incide.description: evaluate a deployment target B with a security scan C and an incident ticket D for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only evaluate a deployment target B with a security scan C and an incident ticket D for a pipeline run A if it is the case that the source is attached to A and A is assigned to run the security scan C and D is an available incident ticket and B is an available deployment target and A is a run allowed by the deployment target B and A is a run allowed by the incident ticket D
I can only evaluate a deployment target B with a security scan C and an incident ticket D for a pipeline run A if it is not the case that the evaluation for A passed
effects: Once I evaluate a deployment target B with a security scan C and an incident ticket D for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is targeting the deployment B and the evaluation for A passed and A requires a secondary review and A has a manual attention flag

Once I evaluate a deployment target B with a security scan C and an incident ticket D for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available deployment target and it is not the case anymore that D is an available incident ticket

clear_secondary_flags_after_evaluation.description: clear secondary flags for a pipeline run A after evaluation with a quality gate B and a build configuration C
preconditions: I can only clear secondary flags for a pipeline run A after evaluation with a quality gate B and a build configuration C if it is the case that the evaluation for A passed and A requires a secondary review and A is assigned to run the quality gate B and A is assigned to run the build configuration C
effects: Once I clear secondary flags for a pipeline run A after evaluation with a quality gate B and a build configuration C, it is not the case anymore that A requires a secondary review and it is not the case anymore that A has a manual attention flag

require_governance_approval.description: require governance approval for a pipeline run A with a quality gate B, a build configuration C, and an approver role D
preconditions: I can only require governance approval for a pipeline run A with a quality gate B, a build configuration C, and an approver role D if it is the case that safety is verified for A and the evaluation for A passed and A is assigned to run the quality gate B and A is assigned to run the build configuration C and A is associated with the governance group D

I can only require governance approval for a pipeline run A with a quality gate B, a build configuration C, and an approver role D if it is not the case that A has a manual attention flag and it is not the case that A is authorized by governance
effects: Once I require governance approval for a pipeline run A with a quality gate B, a build configuration C, and an approver role D, it is the case that A is authorized by governance

authorize_governance_with_security_and_a.description: authorize governance for a pipeline run A with a security scan B, a cache artifact C, and an approver role alt D
preconditions: I can only authorize governance for a pipeline run A with a security scan B, a cache artifact C, and an approver role alt D if it is the case that safety is verified for A and the evaluation for A passed and A is assigned to run the security scan B and A is assigned to run the cache artifact C and A is associated with the governance group D
I can only authorize governance for a pipeline run A with a security scan B, a cache artifact C, and an approver role alt D if it is not the case that A is authorized by governance
effects: Once I authorize governance for a pipeline run A with a security scan B, a cache artifact C, and an approver role alt D, it is the case that A is authorized by governance and A has a manual attention flag

mark_promotion_ready.description: mark a pipeline run A as promotion ready with a quality gate B and a build configuration C
preconditions: I can only mark a pipeline run A as promotion ready with a quality gate B and a build configuration C if it is the case that A is authorized by governance and A has a manual attention flag and A is assigned to run the quality gate B and A is assigned to run the build configuration C
effects: Once I mark a pipeline run A as promotion ready with a quality gate B and a build configuration C, it is the case that A is ready for promotion

Once I mark a pipeline run A as promotion ready with a quality gate B and a build configuration C, it is not the case anymore that A has a manual attention flag and it is not the case anymore that safety is verified for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires a secondary review

reverify_with_operator_credential.description: reverify a pipeline run A using an operator credential C with a cache node B
preconditions: I can only reverify a pipeline run A using an operator credential C with a cache node B if it is the case that A is ready for promotion and A is authorized by governance and the source is attached to A and A runs the reserved cache node B and C is an available operator credential
I can only reverify a pipeline run A using an operator credential C with a cache node B if it is not the case that safety is verified for A
effects: Once I reverify a pipeline run A using an operator credential C with a cache node B, it is the case that safety is verified for A

claim_reviewer_checkpoint.description: claim reviewer checkpoint for a pipeline run A using a cache node B
preconditions: I can only claim reviewer checkpoint for a pipeline run A using a cache node B if it is the case that A is authorized by governance and safety is verified for A and A runs the reserved cache node B
I can only claim reviewer checkpoint for a pipeline run A using a cache node B if it is not the case that A has a manual attention flag and it is not the case that A has a claimed review checkpoint
effects: Once I claim reviewer checkpoint for a pipeline run A using a cache node B, it is the case that A has a claimed review checkpoint

claim_reviewer_checkpoint_by_human.description: claim reviewer checkpoint for a pipeline run A by a human reviewer B
preconditions: I can only claim reviewer checkpoint for a pipeline run A by a human reviewer B if it is the case that A is authorized by governance and safety is verified for A and B is an available human reviewer
I can only claim reviewer checkpoint for a pipeline run A by a human reviewer B if it is not the case that A has a manual attention flag and it is not the case that A has a claimed review checkpoint
effects: Once I claim reviewer checkpoint for a pipeline run A by a human reviewer B, it is the case that A has a claimed review checkpoint
Once I claim reviewer checkpoint for a pipeline run A by a human reviewer B, it is not the case anymore that B is an available human reviewer

bind_promotion_policy_to_variant.description: bind a promotion policy B to variant of a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only bind a promotion policy B to variant of a pipeline run A if it is the case that A has a claimed review checkpoint and B is an available promotion policy and A has a variant compatible promotion policy B
effects: Once I bind a promotion policy B to variant of a pipeline run A, it is the case that A has a variant bound promotion policy B
Once I bind a promotion policy B to variant of a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available promotion policy

apply_promotion_policy_between_variants.description: apply a promotion policy C between a production variant A and a staging variant B
preconditions: I can only apply a promotion policy C between a production variant A and a staging variant B if it is the case that A is a registered run and A is a production variant and A is bound to the promotion policy C and B has a variant bound promotion policy C
I can only apply a promotion policy C between a production variant A and a staging variant B if it is not the case that the promotion policy C is applied to the pipeline run A
effects: Once I apply a promotion policy C between a production variant A and a staging variant B, it is the case that the promotion policy C is applied to the pipeline run A

mark_reverification_required.description: mark reverification as required for a pipeline run A using a cache node B and an operator credential C
preconditions: I can only mark reverification as required for a pipeline run A using a cache node B and an operator credential C if it is the case that A is a registered run and A is a production variant and safety is verified for A and A has a claimed review checkpoint and A runs the reserved cache node B and C is an available operator credential
I can only mark reverification as required for a pipeline run A using a cache node B and an operator credential C if it is not the case that reverification is required for A
effects: Once I mark reverification as required for a pipeline run A using a cache node B and an operator credential C, it is the case that reverification is required for A

finalize_promotion_for_variant.description: finalize promotion for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only finalize promotion for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a staging variant and A is a registered run and the source is attached to A and the evaluation for A passed and A is authorized by governance and A has a claimed review checkpoint and safety is verified for A
I can only finalize promotion for a pipeline run A if it is not the case that A is a promoted run
effects: Once I finalize promotion for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is a promoted run

finalize_promotion_with_policy.description: finalize promotion for a pipeline run A with a promotion policy B
preconditions: I can only finalize promotion for a pipeline run A with a promotion policy B if it is the case that A is a production variant and A is a registered run and the source is attached to A and the evaluation for A passed and A is authorized by governance and A has a claimed review checkpoint and safety is verified for A and the promotion policy B is applied to the pipeline run A
I can only finalize promotion for a pipeline run A with a promotion policy B if it is not the case that A is a promoted run
effects: Once I finalize promotion for a pipeline run A with a promotion policy B, it is the case that A is a promoted run

finalize_promotion_after_reverification.description: finalize promotion for a pipeline run A after reverification
preconditions: I can only finalize promotion for a pipeline run A after reverification if it is the case that A is a production variant and A is a registered run and the source is attached to A and the evaluation for A passed and A is authorized by governance and A has a claimed review checkpoint and safety is verified for A and reverification is required for A
I can only finalize promotion for a pipeline run A after reverification if it is not the case that A is a promoted run
effects: Once I finalize promotion for a pipeline run A after reverification, it is the case that A is a promoted run

action_nl_templates.bind_source_commit_to_run: bind source commit {?source_commit} to pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.unbind_source_commit_from_run: unbind source commit {?source_commit} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.reserve_cache_node_for_run: reserve cache node {?cache_node} for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_cache_node_from_run: release cache node {?cache_node} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.grant_local_review: grant local review for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} using cache node {?cache_node}
action_nl_templates.grant_local_review_by_reviewer: grant local review for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} by human reviewer {?human_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.operator_verify_cache_with_credential: operator verify cache node cache node {?cache_node} for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} using operator credential {?operator_credential}
action_nl_templates.verify_cache_via_policy: verify cache for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} via promotion policy {?promotion_policy}
action_nl_templates.assign_quality_gate_to_run: assign quality gate {?quality_gate} to pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_quality_gate_from_run: release quality gate {?quality_gate} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.assign_build_configuration_to_run: assign build configuration {?build_configuration} to pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_build_configuration_from_run: release build configuration {?build_configuration} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.assign_security_scan_to_run: assign security scan {?security_scan} to pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_security_scan_from_run: release security scan {?security_scan} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.assign_cache_artifact_to_run: assign cache artifact {?cache_artifact} to pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_cache_artifact_from_run: release cache artifact {?cache_artifact} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.evaluate_target_with_quality_and_build: evaluate deployment target {?deployment_target} with quality gate {?quality_gate} and build configuration {?build_configuration} for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a pipeline run or a source commit or a deployment target or a build configuration or a quality gate or a security scan or a cache node or a human reviewer or a promotion policy or a operator credential or a incident ticket or a cache artifact or a governance group is also a object
Everything that is a approver role or a approver role alt is also a governance group
Everything that is a staging variant or a production variant is also a pipeline run
